name: meitu-skills

verdict: Broken at the root: there's no YAML frontmatter at all, meaning no name or description field exists for the routing system to parse — this skill likely can't even be discovered or dispatched correctly. Everything downstream is moot until that's fixed.

highlights.summary: There is no frontmatter `description` field at all, so no trigger phrasing or usage cue exists for a dispatching agent to read.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language appears anywhere in the file, despite this being a broad package routing to 50+ sub-skills where misfire against adjacent tasks is
File opens directly with a markdown heading; there is no `---` YAML frontmatter block anywhere, so no name/description fields exist to parse.
